metadata.website_type: business training and consulting services website

tasks.name: Add the two cheapest beginner leadership courses under $100 each to the cart
tasks.description: Find online leadership courses for beginners, filter them to show only options priced at $100 or less with ratings of 4+ stars, sort by price, and add the two cheapest qualifying courses to the shopping cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Training" or "Courses" option in the main navigation menu, then select "Online Courses" from the dropdown if it appears.
On the online courses page, click the search bar and type "leadership fundamentals", then press Enter to run the search.
In the filters sidebar, set the "Level" filter to "Beginner", set the maximum price to "$100", and set the rating filter to show only courses with 4 or more stars.
Open the sort dropdown above the results and select "Price: Low to High".
From the sorted results list, click on the first course card (the cheapest course that matches the filters) to open its details page.
On the course details page, click the "Add to Cart" button.

Use the breadcrumb navigation or the browser back button to return to the filtered and sorted results, then click the second course card in the list (the next cheapest course) and, on its details page, click "Add to Cart".
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page showing the two selected beginner leadership courses.

tasks.name: Request a proposal for a small-business consulting package with at least 10 hours under $1,200 per month
tasks.description: Browse consulting packages for small businesses, identify a package that offers at least 10 hours of consulting per month with a monthly price under $1,200, and submit a proposal request form for that specific package.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Consulting" or "Consulting Services" option in the main navigation menu.
On the consulting services page, locate the "Packages" section and use the audience filter to select "Small Business (1–50 employees)" or the closest small-business segment.
Use the sort dropdown for packages to select "Monthly Price: Low to High".

From the filtered list, scroll and identify the first package that lists at least "10 hours" of consulting per month and has a monthly price shown as less than "$1,200", then click the package name to open its detail page.
On the selected package detail page, click the "Request Proposal" or "Request a Quote" button.
In the proposal request form, open the "Company size" dropdown and choose the option "21–50 employees".
In the email field, type "sample_company@example.com".
In the "Project start date" field, open the date picker and select a date exactly 30 days from today, using the calendar navigation if needed.
Click the "Submit Request" or "Send Proposal Request" button to submit the form for that consulting package.

tasks.name: Create a saved training plan with three top-rated in-person leadership/change-management workshops
tasks.description: Find in-person workshops related to leadership and change management, limited to 1–2 day formats, sort them by rating, and add the top three workshops to a saved training plan list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Training" or "Workshops & Programs" option in the main navigation menu.
In the workshop filters sidebar, select the categories "Leadership" and "Change Management" (check both if separate checkboxes are available).
In the "Format" or "Delivery" filter, choose "In-person".
In the "Duration" filter, select only "1-day" and "2-day" options.
Open the sort dropdown for the workshop results and select "Rating: High to Low".
Click the first workshop card in the sorted list to open its details page, then click the "Save to Training Plan", "Add to Plan", or similar button.
Use the "Back to Workshops" link or breadcrumb navigation to return to the filtered, sorted workshops list.
Click the second and third workshop cards in the list one by one; for each workshop, open its details page and click the "Save to Training Plan" or equivalent button.
After saving three workshops, click the "My Training Plan" or "Saved Plan" link in the header or account menu to open the page showing the three selected workshops.

tasks.name: Book the earliest 60-minute coaching session next week between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM
tasks.description: Use the consultation booking system to schedule a 60-minute 1:1 coaching session by selecting the earliest available time slot next week during morning hours (9:00 AM–12:00 PM) and completing the booking form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Book a Consultation" or "Schedule a Call" button in the header or main banner.
On the booking page, open the "Service" dropdown and select "1:1 Coaching Session" or the closest equivalent coaching option.
In the duration or session length options, select "60 minutes".
Open the calendar widget and click the arrow or button to move to the next calendar week.
Use any available time-of-day filter or dropdown to select "Morning (9am–12pm)" or manually focus on time slots labeled between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM.
From the available slots shown for next week, click the earliest date and time within the 9:00 AM–12:00 PM range.
In the "Full name" field, type "Jordan Lee".
In the email field, type "jordan.lee@example.com", and in the "Company" or "Organization" field, type "Jordan Consulting Test".
Click the "Confirm Booking", "Schedule", or equivalent button to finalize the 60-minute coaching session slot.

tasks.name: Save three technology industry case studies with budgets over $20,000 and durations under six months
tasks.description: Browse case studies, filter to the technology industry, restrict results to projects with budgets above $20,000 and durations shorter than six months, and save the first three matching case studies to a saved items list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Case Studies" or "Success Stories" link in the main navigation menu.
On the case studies page, use the industry filter to select "Technology".
Adjust the budget filter or slider to set the minimum budget to "$20,000" and leave the maximum at its default or highest value.
In the project duration filter, select the option that corresponds to "Less than 6 months" or "0–6 months".
Open the sort dropdown and select "Newest first" or "Most Recent".
Click the title or card of the first case study in the filtered list to open its details, then click the "Save", "Add to Favorites", or similar button on the case study page.

Use the "Back to Case Studies" link or breadcrumb navigation to return to the list, then open the second and third case studies in the list one by one and click the "Save" or "Add to Favorites" button on each detail page.
Open the account or user menu in the header and click the "Saved Items", "Favorites", or similar option to view the list containing the three saved technology case studies.

tasks.name: Subscribe to a weekly newsletter focused on remote leadership after opening the third 'remote teams' article
tasks.description: Search the blog for content about remote teams, open the third most popular article in that topic, and use the embedded newsletter form to subscribe with weekly frequency and topics related to remote leadership and team productivity.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Insights" or "Blog" link in the main navigation menu.
On the blog page, click the blog search bar, type "remote teams", and press Enter to search.
If a tag or topic filter is available, select the "Remote Work" tag or the closest equivalent related to remote teams.
Open the sort dropdown for article results and choose "Most Popular".
From the sorted results list, click the title of the third article to open its full content page.
On the article page, scroll until you find the newsletter signup form (in the sidebar or below the article), then click in the email field and type "user_remote@example.com".
In the "Topics of interest" or "I want content about" section, select the checkboxes for "Remote leadership" and "Team productivity".
In the "Email frequency" or "How often" options, select the "Weekly" radio button or dropdown option.
Click the "Subscribe", "Sign Up", or equivalent button to submit the newsletter subscription focused on remote leadership content.

tasks.name: Configure an on-site 2-day training for 25 employees with follow-up coaching under an $8,000 estimate
tasks.description: Use the custom pricing calculator to set up an on-site 2-day workshop for 25 participants with group coaching as an add-on, and adjust the configuration so that the estimated total stays below $8,000 before adding it to a proposal request.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Pricing" or "Plans & Pricing" option in the main navigation menu.
On the pricing page, click the "Custom Training Quote", "Estimate Calculator", or similar button to open the interactive pricing tool.
In the "Delivery format" or "Location" options, select "On-site at your office" or "In-house training".
In the "Number of participants" field, type "25".
In the "Workshop length" or "Duration" dropdown, select "2 days".
In the "Add-ons" or "Extras" section, select the "Follow-up group coaching" option and set the number of coaching sessions to "3" using the quantity selector or dropdown.
Leave any optional "Online pre-work modules" or similar add-on checkbox unselected to help keep the total estimate lower.
Click the "Calculate Estimate" or "Update Total" button to display the estimated total price.

If the total estimate shown is above $8,000, reduce the number of coaching sessions by 1 and click "Calculate Estimate" again; repeat this adjustment until the displayed total falls below $8,000, then click the "Add this configuration to Proposal Request" or similar button to move forward with that sub-$8,000 configuration.

tasks.name: Contact a North America–based leadership consultant with 10+ years of experience and at least 5 listed clients
tasks.description: Browse the consultants directory, filter by leadership expertise and North American region, select a consultant whose profile indicates 10 or more years of experience and shows at least five client logos, and send a contact message using the provided form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Our Team", "Consultants", or "Experts" link in the main navigation menu.
On the consultants directory page, use the "Expertise" or "Specialty" filter to select "Leadership Development".
Use the "Region" or "Location" filter to select "North America".
Open the sort dropdown for consultants and choose "Experience (Years): High to Low".
From the sorted list, scroll and click the profile of the first consultant whose summary mentions at least "10+ years" of experience and displays five or more client logos or names.
On that consultant’s profile page, click the "Contact this Consultant", "Request a Call", or similar button.
In the contact form, click the "Subject" field and type "Leadership program for mid-level managers".
In the "Preferred contact method" dropdown, select "Video call".
Click the "Send Message", "Submit", or equivalent button to send the inquiry to that North America–based leadership consultant.
